weeks.focus: Build the routine, start fueling practice

rides.desc: 10 mi flat outside or 30 min Peloton
Add a gentle hill or two. Comfortable pace
Bring a snack, eat at mile 10. Practice fueling!

weeks.focus: Stretch to 30 miles. Wear your race-day shorts and kit

rides.desc: 10 mi outside or 40 min Peloton endurance
Pick a route with climbing. Build leg strength
Wear STP kit, test comfort. Full nutrition practice

weeks.focus: First back-to-back weekend! Simulates STP Day 1 + Day 2

rides.desc: 10 mi outside or 40 min Peloton
Moderate effort with sustained climbs
Steady pace, practice your rest-stop routine
Ride on tired legs — STP Day 2 practice!

weeks.focus: New longest ride: 40 miles! Back-to-back weekend again

rides.desc: 10 mi outside or 30 min Peloton. Easy this week
Event pace. Nothing over moderate effort
40 miles! Full race nutrition. Stop every hour
Easy spin on tired legs. This is normal!

weeks.focus: PEAK WEEK — match your 50-mile Discovery Trail PR!

rides.desc: 10 mi outside or 30 min Peloton. Save legs
Moderate and flat. Don't go hard before Saturday
50 miles! Your biggest training ride. Full race sim
Easy spin. Last back-to-back before STP

weeks.focus: Ride less, rest more. Bike shop tune-up this week!

rides.desc: 10 mi outside or 30 min easy Peloton
Flat and easy. Enjoy the scenery
Test bike after tune-up. Easy effort only

weeks.focus: REST WEEK. Light spinning only. Prep gear, pack bags — race Saturday!

rides.desc: 20-30 min very easy. Peloton or outside
Full rest. Stretch, foam roll. Lay out gear
UW Lot E-18, 6-9 PM. Drop overnight bag
